title: A Month In — How My Own Tool Found What My Doctors Wouldn't
description: What happened after the first release: 50+ issues, an unexpected collaborator, and an AI-driven discovery that 30 years of doctors missed.

title: How I Built a Full Health App in Under Two Weeks with AI
description: The story of building getbased — a 287+ biomarker health dashboard — as one person with Claude Code.
